title: juncus acutiflorus var. rugosus
intro: Juncus acutiflorus var. rugosus, also known as the rough-flowered rush, is a variety of the Juncus acutiflorus plant, a type of rush that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Juncus acutiflorus var. rugosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in the form of extracts or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
